name: bookstack-mcp-server
description: MCP server for BookStack — gives AI assistants (GitHub Copilot, Claude) access to your BookStack knowledge base.

bookstack.url.markdownDescription: URL of your BookStack instance. Example: `https://demo.bookstackapp.com/`

bookstack.tokenId.markdownDescription: BookStack API token ID. Generate under BookStack → **Settings → API Tokens**.

bookstack.tokenSecret.markdownDescription: BookStack API token secret corresponding to `bookstack.tokenId`.

bookstack.scopedBooks.markdownDescription: Restrict the MCP server to specific books. Each entry is a book ID (e.g. `42`) or slug (e.g. `my-book`). Leave empty for no restriction.

bookstack.scopedShelves.markdownDescription: Restrict the MCP server to specific shelves. Each entry is a shelf ID (e.g. `5`) or slug (e.g. `my-shelf`). Leave empty for no restriction.

bookstack.adminPort.markdownDescription: Port of the local admin sidecar. Must match `BOOKSTACK_ADMIN_PORT` set on the MCP server process. Admin features are unavailable when the sidecar is not running.

bookstack.vectorSearch.enabled.markdownDescription: Enable semantic (vector) search. Requires an embedding provider and a vector database to be configured.

bookstack.vectorSearch.embeddingProvider.markdownDescription: Embedding model provider. `Ollama` runs locally; `AzureOpenAI` uses Azure OpenAI Service.

bookstack.vectorSearch.database.markdownDescription: Vector store backend. `Sqlite` requires no extra infrastructure; `Postgres` requires pgvector.

bookstack.vectorSearch.ollamaUrl.markdownDescription: Base URL of the Ollama server. Only used when `bookstack.vectorSearch.embeddingProvider` is `Ollama`.

bookstack.vectorSearch.ollamaModel.markdownDescription: Ollama model name for embeddings. Only used when `bookstack.vectorSearch.embeddingProvider` is `Ollama`.

bookstack.vectorSearch.connectionString.markdownDescription: Database connection string for the vector store. Leave blank to use the default SQLite file (`bookstack-vectors.db`). Required when `bookstack.vectorSearch.database` is `Postgres`.
